raw_consumer_statement: Bought a XXXX phone system for {$85.00} at XXXX online on XX/XX/year> and paid with Citi Costco Visa XXXX XXXX. I returned the said phone on XX/XX/year> to XXXX. I called XXXX on XX/XX/year> XXXX on XX/XX/year> to ascertain the status of the refund in the amount of {$85.00}. Subsequently, I called Citi and started a dispute on or about XX/XX/year>. Citi issued a conditional credit for {$85.00}. However, as of XX/XX/year>, I haven't received the {$85.00} refund from XXXX. XXXX emailed me on XX/XX/year> stating the " refund is on the way. '' Attached are supporting documents that show I returned the XXXX phone system and XXXX acknowledged this and the {$85.00} refund will be issued.
